'''jabuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dracaena|dracaena]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dracaena|dracaena]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jabuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæbikith|jæbikith]] || [[word:jæbikij|jæbikij]] || [[word:jæbikish|jæbikish]] || [[word:jæbiki|jæbiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabubukuth|jabubukuth]] || [[word:jabubukuj|jabubukuj]] || [[word:jabubukush|jabubukush]] || [[word:jabubuku|jabubuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabukuth|jabukuth]] || [[word:jabukuj|jabukuj]] || [[word:jabukush|jabukush]] || [[word:jabuku|jabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabufkuth|jabufkuth]] || [[word:jabufkuj|jabufkuj]] || [[word:jabufkush|jabufkush]] || [[word:jabufkuf|jabufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jabukuthu|jabukuthu]] || [[word:jabukuju|jabukuju]] || [[word:jabukushu|jabukushu]] || [[word:jabukuku|jabukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jabukuth|jabukuth]] || [[word:jabukuj|jabukuj]] || [[word:jabukush|jabukush]] || [[word:jabuku|jabuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jabukuthul|jabukuthul]] || [[word:jabukujul|jabukujul]] || [[word:jabukushul|jabukushul]] || [[word:jabukukul|jabukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jabukuthuthu|jabukuthuthu]] || [[word:jabukujuju|jabukujuju]] || [[word:jabukushushu|jabukushushu]] || [[word:jabukuku|jabukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jabukuthun|jabukuthun]] || [[word:jabukujun|jabukujun]] || [[word:jabukushun|jabukushun]] || [[word:jabukukun|jabukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jabukuthuoro|jabukuthuoro]] || [[word:jabukujuoro|jabukujuoro]] || [[word:jabukushuoro|jabukushuoro]] || [[word:jabukukuoro|jabukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
